content_body:
We all know fall is in the air, but did you know that September and October are two of the most popular months for anniversaries? No matter if you are celebrating your first year together or your fiftieth, our luxury cabins are the perfect backdrop to your romantic getaway. Spoil your partner with a catered dinner, exploring the hidden gems of the North Georgia Mountains, or even an in-cabin massage!

Our founders, Gary and Lissa Knight, fell in love with Blue Ridge back in 2003, and, 21 years later, they are continuing their passion for helping others experience the best of the area with personal recommendations and handpicked cabin rentals. Reserve your romantic cabin in Blue Ridge and choose a company that cares about making your stay as memorable as possible. Continue reading for our guide on how best to plan your anniversary in North Georgia!

Cozy Cabin Moments


Cohutta Sunset

Sometimes the best part of an anniversary getaway is simply slowing down and enjoying each other's company. Our luxury cabins in Blue Ridge offer the perfect setting for those intimate, relaxing moments that make your time together unforgettable. Imagine waking up and enjoying your morning coffee on a private deck surrounded by breathtaking mountain views, and letting the serene atmosphere melt away all distractions.


High Hopes

As the day unfolds, you can cozy up by the fireplace with a glass of wine, or unwind in the hot tub as the sun sets over the mountains. Whether it’s preparing a special meal together in the fully-equipped kitchen or roasting s'mores in an outdoor fire pit, you’ll have everything you need to create special moments without leaving the cabin.

Romantic Pampering and Fine Dining

If your idea of romance involves being pampered, you’re in the right place. Treat yourselves to an in-cabin massage with The Cabin's Calling that will melt away all your stress and set the mood for an intimate evening. Did someone say dinner for two? Add a touch of gourmet indulgence with a private chef to prepare a delicious meal tailored to your preferences.

When it's time to venture out, Blue Ridge has plenty to offer for a romantic night on the town. Begin with a a handcrafted cocktail with a view at Hook & Eye, downtown's favorite rooftop bar. When it’s time for dinner, indulge in some of the finest dining experiences Blue Ridge has to offer.

Whether it’s the fresh Italian cuisine at Ferraro's or The Pasta Market, or the cozy riverside ambiance of nearby Toccoa Riverside Restaurant, there’s a place for every couple. Stop by Mona Lisa's Dessert House for a sweet treat and dessert cocktail to end your evening. Make sure to make reservations in advance! 

Adventure for Two

For those seeking excitement, Blue Ridge offers a wide array of outdoor adventures to make your anniversary one for the books. Start with a thrilling ride from Blue Ridge Adventure Rentals, where you can explore the rugged terrain of the North Georgia mountains on a slingshot.

If you're looking for a more aerial perspective, book a scenic helicopter tour and take in breathtaking views of the area. Blue Ridge Helicopters has a variety of tours from soaring over Amicalola Falls to cruising over the apple orchards in Blue Ridge and Ellijay. Prefer to stay grounded? Horseback riding through the beautiful trails is another romantic way to connect with nature and your partner.

For a classic autumn experience, head to Mercier Orchards for apple picking. Strolling through the orchard, hand in hand, with the crisp fall air is an idyllic way to spend an afternoon. Make sure to take some famous fried apple pies back to your luxury cabin for the perfect snack!

Sip and Shop in Style

North Georgia is also home to some of the state's finest wineries, including Roo Mountain Vineyards. Spend the day wine tasting, listening to live music, and enjoying the panoramic mountain views. There’s nothing quite like sharing a glass of wine with your partner while watching the sun set over the rolling hills.

For the perfect shopping spree, spoil each other with some of Blue Ridge's charming boutiques. Ladies can find clean beauty and skincare products at Blue Ridge Beauty Barn, while men can pick up timeless pieces at OAR Finer Goods. Meet in the middle at Blue Ridge Adventure Wear or Blue Ridge Cotton Company!

A Memorable Anniversary Awaits

No matter how you choose to celebrate your love story, Blue Ridge is the perfect destination for your anniversary. From luxury cabins and fine dining to outdoor adventures and cozy evenings by the fire, the North Georgia Mountains offer everything you need to make your special day unforgettable. So why wait? Reserve your romantic cabin today and discover the magic of Blue Ridge with the one you love.
title: Mountain Magic: Celebrate Your Anniversary in Blue Ridge
